prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南开大学在福建省物理类最低录取位次分别约为2133名、2367名、2190名、2261名、2036名。近五年位次在2036–2367区间波动，2025年基准位次约2 036名，为近五年最优水平，显示2025年报考热度有所回升；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为55人、55人、57人、57人、54人；2026年计划为53人，较 2025年减少1人，小幅缩招约1.85%。缩招通常意味着竞争略有加剧，对位次有上移压力。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 福建省2026年普通高考总人数约267900人，较2025年明显增加；按近年比例估算，物理类考生 约203604人，较2025年增加约6.0%，考生规模扩大加剧了整体竞争。；南开大学位于天津市，与福建省无特殊地域偏好关联；该校在福建省招生人数占全国总招生比例较小（近年约3–5%），属跨省招生常态。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2036名、2026年小幅缩招（竞争略加剧）、福建省考生 总数增加约6%（竞争加剧）、以及声誉负面舆情（可能抑制部分报考热度）等多重因素，在此基础上结合考生规模扩大带来的竞争压力，预测2026 年物理类最低录取位次约2043名，区间1810–2276名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in Fujian Province's Physics Category were approximately 2133, 2367, 2190, 2261, and 2036 respectively. Over the past five years, rankings fluctuated within the range of 2036–2367. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2036, the best level in five years, indicating a rebound in application popularity in 2025. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 55, 55, 57, 57, and 54 students respectively. The 2026 plan is 53 students, a decrease of 1 student from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.85%. A reduction in enrollment usually implies slightly intensified competition, exerting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 21st, firmly among the top universities in the country, maintaining strong appeal for high-scoring candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Nankai University's reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct incidents such as data fabrication in papers by the dean of the School of Life Sciences. Such public opinion may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply, causing the ranking number to increase (easier to enter). Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure, showing no extreme attention signals. Nankai University has 14 A- and above disciplines, including Chemistry A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Mathematics A+, Statistics A, and Physics A. Its strong disciplinary strength is highly attractive to Physics Category candidates applying for popular majors such as Economics and Finance, Mathematics and Statistics, and Engineering Experimental Classes.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates for the 2026 Fujian Province General College Entrance Examination is approximately 267,900, a significant increase from 2025. Estimated by recent proportions, Physics Category candidates are about 203,604, an increase of about 6.0% from 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, with no special regional preference associated with Fujian Province. The proportion of students enrolled in Fujian Province relative to the total national enrollment is small (about 3–5% in recent years), which is normal for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2036, a slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (slightly intensified competition), an increase of about 6% in the total number of candidates in Fujian Province (intensified competition), and negative reputation public opinion (possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm), combined with the competitive pressure from the expanded candidate pool, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 2043, with a range of 1810–2276.

Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 2000) are advised to target Tier 2 majors such as Finance, Information Science and Technology, and Physics and Optoelectronics as their main direction. Candidates with rankings near the upper end of the range (about 2276) can consider Tier 3 majors such as Economics and Future Industry Elite as safe choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in Fujian Province's History Category were approximately 443, 494, 506, 394, and 454 respectively. Over the past five years, rankings fluctuated within the range of 394–506, reaching an optimal 394 in 2024 before falling back to 454 in 2025, showing an overall oscillating pattern. Enrollment plans for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 20, 26, 24, 29, and 33 students respectively, showing a gradual expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 32 students, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3.03%, marking the first contraction in six years, which puts upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In 2026, it ranked 21st in the Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country, maintaining strong appeal for high-scoring History Category students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Nankai University's reputation evaluation was 'significantly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct incidents. Such public opinion may suppress some students' willingness to apply, causing rankings to increase (easier to enter). It ranked 36th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), without extreme attention signals. Nankai University's advantageous disciplines related to History Category are outstanding: Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Marxist Theory A, etc., strongly attracting liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates for the 2026 Fujian Province general college entrance examination is approximately 267,900, a significant increase from 2025. Estimated by recent proportions, History Category candidates are about 64,296, an increase of about 6.7% from 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, with no special regional preference related to Fujian Province. The number of students enrolled in Fujian Province accounts for a small proportion of the national total, which is normal for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 454, the slight enrollment contraction in 2026 (first contraction in six years, slightly intensified competition), the increase in Fujian History Category candidates by about 6.7% (intensified competition), and negative reputation public opinion (may suppress some application enthusiasm), combined with the competitive pressure from the expanded candidate pool, the predicted minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 456, with a range of 404–508.
